ss VergilApplication java.lang.Object ptolemy.actor.gui.MoMLApplication jni.VergilApplication public class VergilApplication extends MoMLApplication This application opens run control panels for models specified on the command line. The exact fac

s specified on the command line. The exact facilities that are available are determined by the configuration file ptolemy/configs/vergilConfiguration.xml, which is loaded before any command-line arguments are processed. If there are no c

line arguments are processed. If there are no command-line arguments at all, then the configuration file is augmented by the MoML file ptolemy/configs/vergilWelcomeWindow.xml. Since: Ptolemy II 1.0 Version: $Id: VergilApplication.java,v 1.12 20
